column1: # Maple Insight — Police Clearance Certificate Cost Data (US-3.4)
# Source:         Official government criminal-record / police-clearance portals for each
#                 country.  Where a range of fees exists, the HIGHER value (including
#                 courier, apostille, or processing surcharges) is used as a conservative
# Currency:       All fees converted to CAD using the Bank of Canada noon rate 2026-04-10.
# isSeeded flag:  false — patch only; isSeeded will be flipped after all three cost
#                 types (medical, PCC, language) are seeded and reviewed.

column3: pccSource
column6: notes

column3: pccSource
column6: notes

column3: Indian Ministry of External Affairs — Passport Seva portal fee (INR 500 govt + processing); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: Govt fee INR 500 (~CAD 8); used INR 2 000 conservative including processing and service centre charge.

column3: NBI Clearance Philippines (PHP 115 online + courier); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: PHP 115 base fee; courier adds PHP 120. Used PHP 235 total ≈ CAD 25.

column3: Nigeria Police Force — character certificate (NGN 50 000); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: NGN 50 000 ≈ CAD 55 at April 2026 rate. Fees volatile; used published tariff.

column3: China Ministry of Public Security — criminal record clearance (notarized); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: RMB 200 base + notarization RMB 350 = RMB 550 ≈ CAD 80.

column3: Pakistan Ministry of Interior — character certificate (PKR 10 000); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: PKR 10 000 ≈ CAD 50 at April 2026 rate.

column3: Brazilian Federal Police — criminal record certificate (BRL 100 online); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: BRL 100 (online) ≈ CAD 30. Free at in-person service points; used online fee as conservative.

column3: French Ministry of Justice — casier judiciaire (EUR 5 base + apostille EUR 45); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: Bulletin No. 3 is free; apostille needed for Canadian use (EUR 45). EUR 50 ≈ CAD 70.

column3: ACRO Criminal Records Office — police certificate (GBP 55); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: GBP 55 ≈ CAD 95 at April 2026 rate. Standard 10-business-day processing.

column3: Abu Dhabi Police — Good Conduct Certificate (AED 200 including processing); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: AED 200 ≈ CAD 70. Dubai Police also issues at similar fee.

column3: Directorate of Criminal Investigations Kenya — Good Conduct Certificate (KES 1 050 + courier); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: KES 1 050 govt fee + KES 500 courier ≈ CAD 20 total.

column3: RNPDNO Mexico — constancia de no antecedentes penales (MXN 1 300); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: MXN 1 300 ≈ CAD 100. Apostille extra (MXN 500) not included; most applicants use notarized copy.

column3: SAPS — Police Clearance Certificate (ZAR 115 govt + courier ZAR 650 total); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: ZAR 115 govt fee; SAPS recommends registered mail ≈ ZAR 650 total ≈ CAD 65.

column3: Vietnamese Ministry of Justice — criminal record certificate No. 2 (VND 500 000); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: VND 500 000 ≈ CAD 30. Certificate No. 2 (for foreigners/emigration) required.

column3: Egyptian Ministry of Interior — criminal record clearance (EGP 500); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: EGP 500 ≈ CAD 15 at April 2026 rate. EGP has depreciated significantly.

column3: FBI Identity History Summary (USD 18 + fingerprinting USD 5); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: USD 18 FBI fee + USD 5 fingerprinting = USD 23 ≈ CAD 30.

column3: Fiscalía General Colombia — certificado de antecedentes judiciales (free + COP 40 000 courier); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: Certificate itself is free; COP 40 000 courier ≈ CAD 15 conservative.

column3: Ethiopian Federal Police Commission — clearance certificate (ETB 1 500 + processing); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: ETB 1 500 ≈ CAD 30 at April 2026 rate.

column3: Bangladesh Police — police clearance certificate (BDT 5 000 including processing fee); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: BDT 5 000 online fee ≈ CAD 60. Dedicated online portal operational since 2023.

column3: Ghana Police Service — police clearance certificate (GHS 500); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: GHS 500 ≈ CAD 50 at April 2026 rate.

column3: Iranian Police Force — good conduct certificate (estimated conservative); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: IRR volatile; CAD 50 estimated from applicant-reported figures due to currency controls.

column3: Korean National Police Agency — criminal record certificate (KRW 1 000 online); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: KRW 1 000 ≈ CAD 1; used CAD 15 including notarization/apostille for overseas use.

column3: Japanese National Police Agency — criminal record certificate (JPY 4 000 + notarization); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: JPY 4 000 + notarization JPY 4 500 = JPY 8 500 ≈ CAD 60.

column3: Bundesamt der Justiz — Führungszeugnis (EUR 13); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: EUR 13 ≈ CAD 19; used CAD 25 including postage/apostille for overseas use.

column3: Ukrainian Ministry of Internal Affairs — background check (UAH 1 500); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: UAH 1 500 ≈ CAD 40 at April 2026 wartime exchange rate.

column3: Romanian Police — cazier judiciar (RON 2 standard + courier RON 60); retrieved 2026-04-10
column6: RON 62 total ≈ CAD 17; used CAD 15 as applicants often use in-person pickup.
